## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/Tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `pnpm run build`
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I updated documentation (README or other docs)
- [ ] I checked for breaking changes

## Breaking Changes

List breaking changes and migration notes, or write `None`.
